title: tilefoundry project policy index
description: Path-scoped policy index. Each entry maps a glob of related files to a set of cross-cutting acceptance criteria, plus indices (refs-only) into existing project documentation for rules and knowledge sections. Rule and knowledge text MUST live in the referenced documentation; this index never inlines content.

id.description: Stable lowercase identifier used in marker comments (policy_ac / policy_rules / policy_knowledge).

description.description: One-line summary surfaced in generated preflight indices.

path_glob.description: OR semantics: the entry applies when any path in scope matches any glob.

ac.description: Plain-text acceptance criteria. These are the verifiable statements injected into matching milestone Acceptance Criteria; AC text lives here because it IS the contract, not a copy of one.

refs_by_role.description: Role-keyed lists of section references. Rule and knowledge text lives in the referenced documents; this object only ever carries indices.

path.description: Repo-relative path to an existing documentation file.

section.description: Heading text of an existing section in the referenced file. The finalizer resolves it by scanning for `## <section>` / `### <section>` / ... lines.
